title: potentilla amansiana
intro: Potentilla amansiana, also known as the Chinese potentilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Potentilla amansiana include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Potentilla amansiana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its extracts can also be found in herbal supplements and teas.
